title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Strong thunderstorms are expected today for Austria, Czech Republic and Poland on June 30th 2026, with the highest risk being MDRT

A wavy cold front will be moving through Central Europe, initiating strong thunderstorms that could also be semi-stationary.

MDRT
N Austria, C-E Czech Republic, SW Poland
Scattered strong thunderstorms that have a possibility in turning into and MCS later in the day will carry risk of Hail, Strong wind gusts and heavy rain that could produce quick flash floods
Models also show high LLS and and increased STP, prompting a very small threat for tornadoes exist
